历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4524 → 4852 → 5367 → 6243 → 5619, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1095 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5619, a rebound from 2024; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 16 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 15, an increase of about 15.4% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are highly recommended majors, highly related to the university's enrollment majors such as Statistics, Software Engineering, Data Science, driving up application popularity; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 239,000, a decrease of about 4.5% from 2025, slightly easing competition; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Hubei candidates; the university's enrollment in Hubei is relatively small (about 15–19 people per year), cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5619, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 15.4% (pushing up the ranking), the reduction of Physics Category candidates by about 4.5% (easing competition), and the attraction of high-scoring candidates by hot majors like Computer Science/Statistics, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 6088, with a range of 5588–6588.
